steps.title: Identify the key term introduced
steps.content: The underlined phrase intraspecific contact with perceived outsiders appears right after the colon, naming a specific kind of social interaction that the passage then links to the discussion of cognitive demands.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content: Choice B correctly says the phrase identifies a type of social interaction whose relevance to higher cognition is the text’s main focus. The other choices either misrepresent the phrase as an example, a narrowing, or a definition, none of which matches its role. That matches choice B — B is correct.
